docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ESCOBAR, MARTHA AS TO DEFENDANT ELLYSON, HEIDI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, MARTHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, MARTHA AS TO DEFENDANT ELLYSON, HEIDI
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AMILED CERTIFIED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVCE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
